tiktok.caption: RoboCo shipped three releases in six days. 0.18.0 (Jul 4) made A2A a delivered inbox instead of a write only log. 0.19.0 (Jul 8) shipped the panel-demo composition kit for this exact video style. 0.20.0 (Jul 9) landed root-owned acceptance criteria via declare_coverage and on-demand sandboxes. Same AI agent company, same six days, three real releases. roboco.tech
